meaning: University of California at Los Angeles (美国)加利福尼亚大学洛杉矶分校
examples: He transferred to UCLA after his freshman year.
UCLA has a sport called "Bruin Walk".
A case in point is the study by Linda Sax at UCLA, who used data from a large national survey of college freshmen to evaluate the effect of single-sex versus coeducational high schools.
He held a board seat and attended UCLA while the other guys got to work.
So is North Carolina and UCLA. Kentucky and Connecticut were never there.
